neighborhoods.name: Lecce Centro Storico
neighborhoods.description: Baroque masterpiece city with ornate limestone churches, Roman amphitheater, and vibrant passeggiata culture

housing.predominantType: Apartments in baroque palazzi and renovated buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Lecce. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: San Cataldo / Torre Chianca
neighborhoods.description: Coastal areas east of Lecce with Adriatic beaches and summer beach club culture
neighborhoods.character: Beach suburban, summer social, Adriatic coast

housing.predominantType: Holiday apartments, houses, and coastal properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Lecce's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Maglie / Otranto Area
neighborhoods.description: Southern Salento towns with lower costs, dramatic coastline, and traditional Pugliese life

housing.predominantType: Stone houses, trulli conversions, and apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Ostuni / Alberobello
neighborhoods.description: Famous white city and trulli village attracting international buyers with unique architecture
neighborhoods.character: White city, trulli architecture, international buyers

housing.predominantType: Trulli, masseria conversions, and white-washed apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
